---
name: Product Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature based on user research
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: 'type: feature, needs: research'
assignees: ''

---

## Problem Statement
**Who?** (Job seeker / Employer / Both)
**What problem are they trying to solve?**
**Why is it important?** (Business impact, user impact)

## User Research Validation
- [ ] Validated with at least 3 users
- [ ] 70%+ of target users confirm need
- [ ] Clear problem statement from research

**Evidence:**
(Link to user research findings or quotes)

## Proposed Solution
Describe the proposed solution in clear, simple terms.

## Success Metrics
How will we know this feature is successful?
- Metric 1: 
- Metric 2: 
- Metric 3: 

## Roadmap Impact
- [ ] Phase 1 (MVP) – Core functionality
- [ ] Phase 2 (Growth) – Trust & community
- [ ] Phase 3 (Scale) – Advanced features

Which phase should this be in? Why?

## Technical Considerations
- Complexity: Low / Medium / High
- Dependencies: (List any blockers)
- Estimated effort: (Engineering estimate)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Feature tested with 5+ users
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] Analytics tracking implemented
- [ ] No blocking issues

## Additional Context
(Add any other context, screenshots, or references)
